welcomeSubtitle: Let's create your personalized skin profile
heroDescription: Scan your face to get AI-powered insights and personalized recommendations.
selectLanguageSubtitle: Choose your preferred language for the app experience.
notificationPermissionSubtitle: Get reminders to scan your skin, daily skincare tips, and alerts when your analysis is ready.
noFaceDetected: No face detected. Please upload a clear front-facing selfie.
multipleFacesDetected: Only one face should be visible in the photo.
loginSubtitle: Join SkinAI to scan and analyze your skin.
welcomeBackSubtitle: Log in to track your skincare journey.
passwordLengthError: Password must be at least 6 characters
skinTypeDryDesc: Feels tight, flakey, or has rough patches.
skinTypeOilyDesc: Excess sebum, shiny appearance, enlarged pores.
skinTypeCombinationDesc: Oily T-zone, dry or normal cheeks.
uvAlertDesc: UV index is elevated. Apply SPF 50 sunscreen.
hydrationReminderDesc: Drink 500ml water to recover cell elasticity.
reviewProfileSub: Review your details before we calibrate your AI profile.
calibrationDesc: Our AI is analyzing your preferences to deliver accurate skin insights.
selectSkinTypeSubtitle: Select the profile that best matches your daily skin texture.
logOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out of SkinAI?
noScansYetDesc: Generate your first medical-grade report to track your scan history.
exportNoRecords: No scan records found to export.
exportSuccess: Here is my exported SkinAI diagnostic database!
exportError: Unable to export data. Please try again.
deleteAccountConfirmDesc: This action is permanent and deletes all your stored scan logs from the system.
deleteAccountError: Unable to delete your account. Re-login and try again.
scanSubtitle: Get a clear analysis of your skin in just a few seconds.
imageSelected: Image Selected. Tap Capture to Analyze.
positionFace: Position your face in the frame
diagnosticsSubtitle: SkinAI is scanning lighting, sharpness, orientation, and landmarks.
unableToAnalyzeFormat: Unable to analyze image format. Please try again.
imageTooDarkError: Image too dark. Please scan in a well-lit environment.
imageTooBrightError: Image too bright. Please avoid harsh, direct light sources.
imageBlurryError: Blurry image detected. Please hold your camera steady.
errorProcessingImage: An error occurred during image processing:
summaryExcellent: Your skin is exceptionally healthy with superior moisture barrier values. Focus on maintaining preventative sunscreen layers and light humectants.
summaryGood: Your skin shows overall balanced health with minor concerns. Dark circles and redness are your primary areas of attention to improve cellular elasticity.
summaryAttention: Moderate congestion and localized inflammation observed. Focus on calming barrier repair, anti-inflammatory routines, and avoid abrasive physical scrubs.
indicatorAcneDesc: Acne severity index is at {value}%. Mild congestion localized near the forehead and chin coordinates.
indicatorDarkCirclesDesc: Dark circle markers detected at {value}%. Prominent under-eye vascular pigments mapped.
indicatorPigmentationDesc: Pigmentation distribution score is {value}%. UV exposure markers observed around cheek area.
indicatorRednessDesc: Vascular redness activity is {value}%. High blood flow detected around nose and inner cheeks.
indicatorTextureDesc: Micro-texture variance is {value}%. Minor pore congestion detected across overall central facial region.
initialBaselineReport: Initial baseline report. Scans saved in history will calculate comparison score trends.
trendComparison: Skin score changed by {value} points compared to previous scan score of {prev}.
addedToHistory: Added to your scan history log
unableToGeneratePdf: Unable to generate PDF. Please try again.
unableToSaveReport: Unable to save your report. Please try again.
pdfShareText: Check out my SkinAI diagnostic report.
cleanseMildFaceWash: Cleanse with a mild pH-balanced face wash
acneMildMorning: Gentle Cleanser (Mild acne care) + Salicylic Acid 2x weekly
acneModerateMorning: Salicylic Acid cleanser (Moderate breakout target) + Niacinamide serum
acneSevereMorning: Gentle non-foaming wash (Severe acne - avoid active conflicts)
darkCirclesMorning1: Apply Caffeine eye serum to reduce puffiness
darkCirclesNight1: Caffeine eye cream + Reduce blue-light screen exposure
textureNight: Retinol treatment to accelerate cell turnover
summaryBreakoutSevere: Severe breakout activity detected. Focus on dermatologist guidance and avoid active ingredient conflicts.
summaryAcneModerate: Moderate acne and pore blockage identified. Salicylic Acid and Niacinamide can target excess sebum.
summaryDarkCirclesProminent: Prominent dark circles present. Focus on improving sleep quality, hydration, and reducing blue-light exposure.
summaryPigmentationSPF: Hyperpigmentation is one of the primary concerns requiring consistent daily SPF 50+ sunscreen.
summaryRednessCalming: Elevated redness detected. Focus on calming and barrier repair.
summaryTextureExfoliation: Uneven micro-texture observed. Focus on gentle chemical exfoliation and deep hydration support.
summaryHealthyBalanced: Your skin barrier shows highly balanced overall health. Focus on preventative sunscreen layers and hydration support.
